name: Art Adore En
original_name: ศิลปะหลงกล
overview:
Pretty-faced art student Nong Hin is admired and approached by many. However, Hin isn't interested; he already has someone he likes, someone he's been waiting for forever.

Then he meets Phayu. Phayu is his senior, an engineering student attending the same university. Phi Phayu flirts with Hin shamelessly.

trailers.title: [Official Pilot] ศิลปะหลงกล Art Adore En Series (TJ Tommys)
